videos.headline: Johncarlos Miller II hauls in a TD for Texas Tech
videos.description: Behren Morton finds Johncarlos Miller II to get Texas Tech on the board first vs. Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Johncarlos Miller II hauls in a TD for Texas Tech) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Josh Kelly sneaks into the end zone for Texas Tech
videos.description: Josh Kelly goes 20-yards to the end zone for Texas Tech vs. Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Josh Kelly sneaks into the end zone for Texas Tech) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Leavitt scores a TD for Arizona State
videos.description: Arizona State's Sam Leavitt drives into the end zone at the end of the first half vs. Texas Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Leavitt scores a TD for Arizona State) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalin Conyers runs in the TD for Texas Tech
videos.description: Jalin Conyers takes the snap and rushes for a Texas Tech touchdown against his former team Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalin Conyers runs in the TD for Texas Tech) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cameron Skattebo scores a TD for the Sun Devils
videos.description: Cameron Skattebo scores his second touchdown for the Sun Devils at the end of the second half vs. the Red Raiders.
